summary: Iteration 3 end-to-end validation of Meetings Hub enrichment. Backend: 14/14 new pytest cases pass (search, Attio enrichment, Fireflies action_items_list, single-meeting GET, action-items, trends regression). Backend curl validation matches spec exactly: BCG=8, Boston Consulting=6+, Wordflex=1, Afore=13, Zoom=23, all sorted desc by start_time. Frontend: stats 208/200/8/8, date-grouped sections (MAY 2026/APRIL 2026/SEPTEMBER 2025 etc) sorted desc, Attio linked-company chip 'Boston Consulting Group' visible on cards, action-item count badges ('2 action items', '4 action items') visible, drawer with Copy link + all 4 tabs (summary/transcript/actions/ai-chat) work, Transcript tab shows graceful 'Transcript unavailable — Open in Fireflies' empty state (no JS crash), AI Chat input + send btn present, Calendar Timeline tab fully wired with timeline-view-month/week/day + timeline-day-YYYY-MM-DD chips.

issues: Empty state shown correctly (no crash). Two 404 console errors logged from /api/meetings/<fireflies_id>/transcript — expected per spec (Fireflies API rate-limited until 2026-06-04). Could swallow the 404 client-side to keep console clean, but not a bug.
Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on initial mount when chart container has 0 size — cosmetic, pre-existing.

action_items: Optional: silence the AxiosError console.log in the Transcript tab when /transcript returns 404 (already renders graceful empty-state UI).
Optional: suppress the Recharts 0-size warning on Dashboard charts (unrelated to Meetings Hub).
critical_code_review_comments: Search endpoint correctly returns spec-matching counts: BCG=8, Wordflex=1, Afore=13, Zoom=23. Linked-company-name regex search + action_items_list search both verified end-to-end.
Attio meetings carry linked_company_names resolved to display names (e.g. 'Boston Consulting Group') and meeting description surfaced as summary — both verified via API and visible on cards/drawer.
Fireflies meetings have non-empty action_items_list parsed from multi-line string; UI shows correct count badges (e.g. '2 action items' on Govinda Salesforce x Kartik).
Free-tier-safe get_transcript: drawer Transcript tab handles 404 gracefully with 'Open in Fireflies' button; no white-screen.

All required data-testids present: meeting-card-*, meeting-drawer, copy-link-btn, drawer-tab-summary/transcript/actions/ai-chat, ai-chat-input, ai-chat-send-btn, tab-timeline, timeline-view-month/week/day, timeline-prev/today/next-btn, timeline-day-YYYY-MM-DD.
Single-meeting GET /api/meetings/{id} now returns 200 for valid id and 404 for bogus id (regression from iteration 2 fixed).
Dashboard trends endpoint now returns non-null trends + changes objects (regression from iteration 2 fixed).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all required UI elements + integrations verified

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing 208 (200 Attio + 8 Fireflies) dataset with 50 backfilled action items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suites: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_meetings_hub.py /app/backend/tests/test_meetings_enrichment.py -v. Search counts to assert: BCG=8, Wordflex=1, Afore=13, Zoom=23, Boston Consulting>=6. Fireflies API stays rate-limited until 2026-06-04 UTC — /api/meetings/<fireflies_id>/transcript will 404; UI shows 'Transcript unavailable' empty state which is the expected behavior, NOT a bug. Sample Fireflies meeting id with action items: 'Govinda (Salesforce) x Kartik | Harden' (May 2, 2026, 2 action items).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. All iteration-3 enrichment features verified working end-to-end.
